title: Frequently Asked Questions
subtitle: Everything you need to know about BornoFlow.
emptyDesc: Try a different search term or category.

items.question: What is BornoFlow?
items.answer: BornoFlow is a complete academic productivity platform for CSE and SWE students. It includes assignment cover generation, lab reports, CV builder, CS learning tools, interview preparation, career hub, developer tools, and more.

items.question: Who is BornoFlow built for?
items.answer: BornoFlow is designed for computer science and software engineering students in Bangladesh — especially DIU, BRAC, NSU, and other universities — but anyone learning CS can benefit.

items.question: Can I contribute to BornoFlow?
items.answer: Yes! BornoFlow is open source on GitHub. You can star the repo, report bugs, suggest features, or submit pull requests. We welcome community contributions.

items.question: What CS topics can I learn?
items.answer: BornoFlow covers 13+ topics including Data Structures, Algorithms, Operating Systems, Databases, Networking, Web Development, and more — with interactive simulators and lessons.

items.question: Does BornoFlow have exams and quizzes?
items.answer: Yes. The exam system lets you test your knowledge with timed quizzes, track scores, and compete on the leaderboard across CS topics.

items.question: Can I track my learning progress?
items.answer: Absolutely. Your progress is saved automatically so you can pick up where you left off across topics, lessons, and exam attempts.

items.question: Can I build ATS-friendly resumes?
items.answer: Yes. Our CV Builder creates Europass-style, ATS-optimized resumes that pass applicant tracking systems used by top tech companies.

items.question: What resume formats are supported?
items.answer: BornoFlow supports Europass-style CVs with sections for education, experience, skills, projects, and certifications. Export as PDF with one click.

items.question: Does the ATS checker really work?
items.answer: The ATS Checker analyzes your resume for keyword density, formatting issues, and readability — giving you actionable tips to improve your chances.

items.question: How does Interview Hub work?
items.answer: Interview Hub imports real interview questions from Bangladesh tech companies. Browse by company, search topics, take quizzes, and bookmark questions for revision.

items.question: What career tools are available?
items.answer: Career Hub includes resume builder, ATS checker, portfolio builder, interview prep, job tracker, internship tracker, salary calculator, and career roadmaps.

items.question: Can I prepare for specific companies?
items.answer: Yes. Interview Hub organizes questions by company — including Brain Station 23, Cefalo, Samsung R&D, and more — so you can prepare strategically.

items.question: What developer tools are included?
items.answer: BornoFlow offers 100+ browser-based tools: JSON formatter, CSS generators, Tailwind playground, image converters, encoding tools, color pickers, and more.

items.question: Do developer tools work offline?
items.answer: Most tools run entirely in your browser with no server calls. Some features may require an internet connection for initial page load.

items.question: Is BornoFlow free?
items.answer: Yes! BornoFlow is completely free for students. No credit card required. All core features including assignment covers, lab reports, CV builder, and learning tools are available at no cost.

items.question: Will there be paid plans in the future?
items.answer: Core student features will always remain free. Premium features for institutions or advanced AI tools may be introduced later, but the student plan stays free forever.

items.question: Is my data safe?
items.answer: Yes. We follow industry best practices for data security. Your documents are processed locally when possible, and we never sell your personal data. See our Privacy Policy for details.

items.question: Do I need an account?
items.answer: Most tools work without an account. Signing in lets you save your student profile, track progress, and sync data across devices.

items.question: Can I use BornoFlow on mobile?
items.answer: Yes. BornoFlow is fully responsive and works on phones, tablets, and desktops with touch-friendly controls and a mobile-optimized layout.

items.question: How do I report a bug or request a feature?
items.answer: Open an issue on our GitHub repository or email us at bornosoftnr@gmail.com. We actively review feedback and prioritize popular requests.
